info.title: Saturday's Spinout API
info.description: REST API for Saturday's Spinout — an iRacing race log and analytics platform.

tags.name: Session
tags.description: iRacing session results and lap data

post.description: Exchange an iRacing OAuth authorization code for a JWT.
Refresh the current JWT using the embedded iRacing refresh token.

get.summary: Get journal entry for a race

get.description: Aggregated race statistics with optional grouping by dimension or time granularity. `groupBy` and `granularity` are mutually exclusive.

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Dimension to group by (repeatable). Mutually exclusive with granularity.

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Time granularity for time-series breakdown. Mutually exclusive with groupBy.

get.description: Returns the set of series, car, and track IDs the driver has raced in the given time range. Use with reference endpoints for display names.
Full iRacing session results including all sim-session results, driver results, weather, and track state.
Individual lap timing and event data for a driver in a specific sim-session.

parameters.name: simsession
parameters.description: Sim-session number (e.g. 0 for qualifying, 1 for race)

post.description: Enqueues a race data ingestion job. The server queries iRacing for recent race results and stores them. Progress is reported via WebSocket.

get.description: Returns the raw iRacing access token from the current session. Requires developer entitlement.

Proxies requests to the iRacing Data API using the current session's access token. Requires developer entitlement. The response body and content type are passed through from iRacing. The path parameter captures the full remaining path (e.g. `data/results/search_series`).

parameters.name: proxy+
parameters.description: iRacing API path including nested segments (e.g. data/results/search_series)

200.description: Proxied response from iRacing Data API (content type passed through from upstream)

bearerAuth.description: JWT obtained from the /auth/ir/callback endpoint. Contains encrypted iRacing tokens and user claims.

DriverID.name: driver_id
DriverID.description: iRacing customer ID. Must match the authenticated user.

DriverRaceID.name: driver_race_id
DriverRaceID.description: Race ID (Unix timestamp of the race start time)

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the request can be retried

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI used in the authorization request

notifyConnectionId.description: WebSocket connection ID to receive progress updates

id.description: Race ID (Unix timestamp of start time)

period.description: Time period label. Format depends on granularity: 2024-01-15 (day), 2024-W03 (week), 2024-01 (month), 2024 (year).

driverRaceId.description: Present when the authenticated driver participated in this session

eventAverageLap.description: Lap time in 1/100ths of a second

eventBestLapTime.description: Lap time in 1/100ths of a second

SessionTrack.description: Track info as returned within a session result (subset of full Track reference data)
